original_hypothesis.title: setUSDThresholds Allows Zero or Extreme Values Breaking Governance
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: setUSDThresholds has no bounds validation on _approve and _disapprove parameters. Setting DISAPPROVE_THRESHOLD to 0 makes the condition disapprovalsCount < 0 impossible for uint8 (always false), preventing ANY proposal from executing. Setting APPROVE_THRESHOLD to 0 with high DISAPPROVE_THRESHOLD allows proposals to execute with just the proposer's auto-approval since approvalsCount starts at 1.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The _execUSDPriceUpdate condition requires both approvalsCount >= APPROVE_THRESHOLD AND disapprovalsCount < DISAPPROVE_THRESHOLD. With DISAPPROVE_THRESHOLD=0, the second condition is always false (uint8 disapprovalsCount >= 0 is always true), permanently blocking all price updates.

proof_of_signal.pattern: No bounds check on threshold values; _execUSDPriceUpdate: disapprovalsCount < DISAPPROVE_THRESHOLD where DISAPPROVE_THRESHOLD could be 0

preconditions: Admin calls setUSDThresholds with extreme values (0 or 255)
No proposal currently in progress (required by the function)

initial_code_evidence.vulnerable_pattern: No minimum/maximum bounds on threshold values
initial_code_evidence.specific_concern: DISAPPROVE_THRESHOLD=0 makes disapprovalsCount < 0 always false for uint8; all proposals permanently blocked

analysis_questions: Is admin a multisig or EOA?
Can admin fix by calling setUSDThresholds again?
Is there a timelock on admin actions?
validation_requirements: Propose and attempt to approve a price update

original_hypothesis.preliminary_attack_scenario: Compromised or malicious admin sets DISAPPROVE_THRESHOLD=0. Now _execUSDPriceUpdate requires disapprovalsCount < 0 which is impossible for uint8. All price updates are permanently blocked. USD prices become stale, distorting getLockedWeightedValue and downstream rewards.

potential_impact_if_confirmed.financial_impact: Permanent inability to update USD prices; stale prices distort reward distribution
potential_impact_if_confirmed.recovery_possibility: Admin can call setUSDThresholds again to fix, but requires recognizing the issue

original_hypothesis.test_coverage_gap: No test for extreme threshold values

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
